Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 12 

DAW_PROD_SLCTN_CD 

LABEL: Dispense as Written (DAW) Product Selection Code 

DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the prescriber's instruction regarding substitution of generic equivalents or order to 
dispense the specific prescribed medication. 

Part D plans generally require pharmacies to use generics or the least expensive version of the 
prescribed
